generated_comment: Arre yaar, isme issue kya hai? Jo jahan better ho wahi sambhalta hai. Main bahar ke kaam, bills, bank, gaadi sab dekh leta hoon, aur ghar ki planning, khana-vana, daily management women hi naturally better handle karti hain. Isko sexism mat banao, practical arrangement hai bas.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it naturalizes a gendered division of labor as merely efficient and practical, assigning finances/external tasks to men and domestic management to women. It encodes the 'jo jahan better hai' efficiency framing and the belief that women are naturally suited to home-related work.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 38. Married. A man in Delhi. You are on a matrimonial website helping your younger sister Neha who is 28 create a profile because your parents have been asking you to handle it since Neha is not taking it seriously herself. You are on a phone call with Neha telling her you have created the profile and what you have written and what filters you have set for prospective matches. Neha is not happy that you did this without asking her. You are telling her why you did it anyway and why at 28 she does not have the luxury of not taking this seriously
